issues.comment: Method calls `PRCommentWorkflow._truncate_title(title)` but `_truncate_title` is defined as a static method in `CommitContextIntegration` class, not in `PRCommentWorkflow`. This will cause AttributeError at runtime when the method is called.

PRCommentWorkflow._truncate_title(title) calls a method on undefined class PRCommentWorkflow, but _truncate_title is defined as a static method on CommitContextIntegration in the same file at line 578, causing NameError at runtime.
